sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n103462" key="tetra/odos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τετρᾰ´-οδος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n103462.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">τετραοδία</ref></xr>, Orac. ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0525.tlg001.perseus-grc1:8:9:4" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paus.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8.9.4</biblScope> </bibl>; cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τρίοδος</foreign>.</sense> </entryFree>
